title: The National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993
full_text: The National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 राष्ट्री य अध्यापक शिक्षा परिषद्अधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199373 Act Number: 73 Enactment Date: 1993-12-29 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 Hindi Title: राष्ट्री य अध्यापक शिक्षा परिषद्अधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a National Council for Teacher Education with a view to achieving planned and co-ordinated development of the teacher education system throughout the country, the regulation and proper maintenance of norms and standards in the teacher education system including qualifications of school teachers and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of School Education and Literacy Enforcement Date: 01-07-1995 Notification: 1st July, 1995, vide notification No. S.O. 620(E), dated 1st July, 1995, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ESTABLISHMENT OF THE COUNCIL CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF THE COUNCIL CHAPTER IV RECOGNITION OF TEACHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS CHAPTER V BODIES OF THE COUNCIL CHAPTER VI FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the Council. Section 4. Term of office and conditions of service of Members. Section 5. Disqualification for office of Member. Section 6. Vacation of office of Member. Section 7. Meetings of the Council. Section 8. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of the Council. Section 9. Power to co-opt. Section 10. Appointment of officers and other employees of the Council. Section 11. Authentication of the orders and other instruments of the Council. Section 12. Functions of the Council. Section 12A. Power of Council to determine minimum standards of education of school teachers. Section 13. Inspection. Section 14. Recognition of institutions offering course or training in teacher education. Section 15. Permission for a new course or training by recognised institution. Section 16. Affiliating body to grant affiliation after recognition or permission by the Council. Section 17. Contravention of provisions of the Act and consequences thereof. Section 18. Appeals. Section 19. Executive Committee. Section 20. Regional Committees. Section 21. Power to terminate the Regional Committee. Section 22. Payment to the Council. Section 23. Fund of the Council. Section 24. Budget of the Council. Section 25. Annual report. Section 26. Accounts and audit. Section 27. Delegation of powers and functions. Section 28. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 29. Directions by the Central Government. Section 30. Power to supersede the Council. Section 31. Power to make rules. Section 32. Power to make regulations. Section 33. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 34. Power to remove difficulties.
